meaning: adj.未耗尽的,未吃(或喝)光的,未遭毁灭的
examples: I have them stored away, I can project them on mental screen and watch them, unchanged, unconsumed.
For staff who leave the service, they are required to compensate the cost of the items unconsumed.
The structure of unconsumed pulverized coal is different from that of coke according to petrographical microanalysis.
